task_objective: Professional Fashion Inspiration Transfer & High-Precision Garment Design Editing

structural_reference.description: High-precision preservation of garment structural framework, including exact proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length

aesthetic_reference.description: Extract high-end aesthetic elements, including color system, pattern texture, and overall style tone

model_reference.description: Figure 2 provides model references for garment-wearing presentation - full-body model consistency, precise preservation of identity features, facial details, body proportions, and natural garment-body interaction such as fabric draping and fit

workflow.step_1_structural_analysis: Parse structural elements from Figure 1 with strict precision, including garment silhouette lines, cutting structure, proportional relationships, seam positions, collar construction, sleeve design, and detail features.
workflow.step_2_aesthetic_extraction: Extract color palette, pattern texture, fabric characteristics, and overall style elements from Figure 2, to be applied exclusively to the garment structure from Figure 1.
workflow.step_3_composite_generation: Generate the garment design by precisely applying aesthetic elements from Figure 2 onto the garment structure from Figure 1. Ensure seamless integration with no visible artifacts, physically accurate fabric draping, and natural aesthetic fit. Preserve complete structural integrity from Figure 1 while incorporating color system, pattern texture, and style elements from Figure 2.

FINAL_OUTPUT.description: Professional fashion photography composite presentation in 2x2 grid layout
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_1: Garment alone without model, flat lay or mannequin presentation, clean background, showcasing complete garment structure, silhouette, and aesthetic details
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_2: Front full-body view (using model_reference parameters) - model wearing the garment, emphasizing overall garment fit, silhouette, collar styling, and complete front presentation
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_3: Tilted detail close-up (using model_reference parameters) - slightly angled diagonal perspective focusing on key garment details such as collar construction, button or closure area, fabric texture, and stitching craftsmanship
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_4: Back view (using model_reference parameters) - presenting the back design of the garment, including back seam details, hemline, and overall rear silhouette when worn
FINAL_OUTPUT.consistency_requirements: Preserve the complete structural integrity from Figure 1 — garment proportions and silhouette remain untouched across all variations. When model_reference parameters are applied, maintain consistent identity features, facial details, body proportions, and natural garment-body interaction across all variations. Guarantee consistent structural framework and identical garment characteristics across all four grid variations.
